Patient: John A. Smith (DOB: 03/15/1959)
MRN: 789012
SSN: 123-45-6789
Phone: (555) 123-4567
Email: john.smith@email.com
Address: 123 Main Street, Springfield, IL 62701

Referring Physician: Dr. Jane Wilson
Institution: Springfield Orthopaedic Associates

CONSULTATION NOTE:
Dr. Wilson referred this 67-year-old male for evaluation of right knee pain.
Patient reports progressive worsening over the past 2 years.
Has tried NSAIDs (ibuprofen 800mg TID), physical therapy for 6 weeks,
and one cortisone injection with only temporary relief.

Radiographs show bone-on-bone medial compartment with varus deformity.
Diagnosis: M17.11 Primary OA right knee.

Recommend right total knee arthroplasty.
